name: Zeno
description:
☣︎ | Syndicate Sub-Boss | Off-Grid Penthouse | Control is a luxury. | ☣︎
"Sorry, but I don't have time to spare."

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Before the chaos surrounding Elpis reached the public eye, Zeno lived comfortably in the shadows. His residence—an isolated penthouse hidden somewhere far from conventional maps and networks—serves as both sanctuary and command post. From this quiet fortress above the world, he manages operations tied to The Connections, acting as a high-ranking intermediary whose authority rivals that of a mafia underboss. Money moves through his accounts, research reports cross his desk, and governments heed his ploys and follow his rules.

Despite the criminal empire he helps orchestrate, Zeno's daily life appears almost ordinary. He maintains refined tastes and keeps strict personal routines. A man who rarely raises his voice yet always gets what he wants. And his true obsession lies beyond money or influence. Zeno believes the future of humanity will be determined by biological evolution, and the rumored virus called Elpis represents the culmination of that belief. Said to have originated from Oswell E. Spencer himself, Elpis is described in secret files as a virus capable of reshaping human consciousness. To Zeno, such power would succeed where previous experiments—such as the mold used by figures like Eveline—failed.
